allow: Bash(node -e "import\('yahoo-finance2'\).then\(m => { const yf = m.default; console.log\(typeof yf.quote\); yf.quote\('BBCA.JK'\).then\(r => console.log\(r?.symbol\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\('import failed:', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('yahoo-finance2'\).then\(m => { const yf = m.default; console.log\(yf instanceof Object\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(yf\)\); console.log\(yf?.quote?.toString\(\)?.slice\(0,100\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('symbol:', d['stock']['symbol'], 'price:', d['stock']['regularMarketPrice'], 'history_count:', len\(d['history']\)\)")
